title: Senior AI Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior AI Engineer with 5+ years experience in NLP, LLMs, RAG systems, and Python. You will design and deploy production ML pipelines. Remote-friendly, great benefits. Salary: 35,000-45,000 ILS/month.

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Entry level data analyst. Excel, basic SQL. No prior experience needed.

title: Machine Learning Lead
description: Lead a team of 4 ML engineers building fraud detection and credit risk scoring models. PyTorch, Python 3.10+, strong communication. Hybrid Tel Aviv. 5+ years required.

title: AI Product Manager
description: Drive AI product roadmap, work with LLM engineering teams, define metrics. 3+ years PM, some technical background. Equity + salary.
